'''Anima-infused Bark''' is a resource item.

==Products==
{{Uses material list|Anima-infused Bark}}

==Journal==
{{Journal entry|
The magic of Ashenfall permeates the very trees of the region, imbuing their bark with mystical properties. This bark can be refined into wild anima, a magical crafting component that is popular with spellcasters of all kinds.
}}
